additionalInfo.description: Scrape product pages for price information, detect price changes, and send email notifications when prices drop.

inputSchema.name: url
inputSchema.description: The product page URL to scrape for price data

inputSchema.name: email
inputSchema.description: Email address to send price change notifications to

additionalInfo.description: Scrape the product page HTML content
Extract price data from the scraped HTML content

configuration.jsScript:
try { var data = JSON.parse(msg);
return data.price_changed === true; } catch(e) { return msg.length > 50; }

additionalInfo.description: Filter: only proceed if the price has changed

configuration.subject: Price Alert: Price changed for tracked product

additionalInfo.description: Send email notification about the price change
